zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Buswell於大約1547年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾迪申利時，他的父親John Buswell34歲，母親Mrs. John Buswell30歲。他於大約1570年與Mrs. Margaret Buswell在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1609年6月在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾斯班德斯 博斯沃斯享年63歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾斯班德斯 博斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Buswell于大约1547年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾迪申利时，他的父亲John Buswell34岁，母亲Mrs. John Buswell30岁。他于大约1570年与Mrs. Margaret Buswell在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1609年6月在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾斯班德斯 博斯沃斯享年63岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾斯班德斯 博斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Buswell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of   Boswell  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Boswell
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Beuzeville-la-Giffard in Seine-Maritime, France, named with the ancient Germanic personal name Boso + ville ‘settlement’. The final element has been altered as a result of association with the common placename ending -well ‘spring, stream’. Some instances of Bovill may have the same origin.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Buswell was born about 1547, in Dishley, Leicestershire, England, his father, John Buswell, was 34 and his mother, Mrs. John Buswell, was 30. He married Mrs. Margaret Buswell about 1570, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. He died in June 1609, in Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Buswell est né environ 1547, à Dishley, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Buswell, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Buswell, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Margaret Buswell environ 1570, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en juin 1609, à Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Buswell um 1547 in Dishley, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Buswell 34 und seine Mutter Mrs. John Buswell 30. Er hat um 1570 in England Mrs. Margaret Buswell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb im Juni 1609 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Buswell è nato il circa 1547 nel Dishley, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, John Buswell, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. John Buswell, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Margaret Buswell circa 1570, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1609, nel Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Buswellが約1547年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアディシュリーで生まれた時，父John Buswellは34歳，母Mrs. John Buswellは30歳であった。約1570年にイギリスでMrs. Margaret Buswellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1609年6月にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアハスバンズ ボスウオルスで63歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアハスバンズ ボスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Buswell(이)가 대략 1547년 영국 레이스스터실르 디슐리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Buswell(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John Buswell(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1570년 영국에서 Mrs. Margaret Buswell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1609년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 후스반드즈 보스워스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 후스반드즈 보스워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Buswell nasceu aproximadamente 1547, em Dishley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Buswell, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John Buswell, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Margaret Buswell aproximadamente 1570, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em junho de 1609, em Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Buswell родился около 1547 г. в местности дишли, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Buswell было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Buswell, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Margaret Buswell около 1570 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер июнь 1609 г. в местности хусбандс босворт, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности хусбандс босворт, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Buswell nació aproximadamente 1547, en Dishley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Buswell, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mrs. John Buswell, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Mrs. Margaret Buswell aproximadamente 1570, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en junio de 1609, en Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Husbands Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
